# Session Reporting Reference

Use when generating or repairing `SESSION_REPORT.md` at session start.

## Minimum viable report
- Session ID
- Timestamp
- Profile
- Model
- Work completed
- Tools/skills used
- Current state
- Session changelog

## When an existing report is only a stub
Treat it as absent and overwrite it. A stub is usually just a heading, placeholder lines, or an incomplete table without actionable continuity.

## Good shape
- Tables over prose
- Explicit file changelog
- Short key-insights list
- No invented prior work

## Verification
- Re-read the generated file
- Confirm it includes a real changelog
- Confirm it is concise enough to help the next session quickly recover context
